name: Data-source tracking
about: Track an external data source through import, audit, and deduplication

## Source

- Source name:
- Source owner or provider:
- Access URL or location:
- Export or download date:
- File format:

## Scope

- Organism or species:
- Antimicrobials or marker classes:
- Expected data types:

## Processing Status

- [ ] Raw source file stored outside version control or under the ignored raw data path.
- [ ] Import method documented.
- [ ] Field mapping reviewed.
- [ ] Deduplication status recorded.
- [ ] Records linked to source identifiers.
- [ ] Exclusions or background-only records documented.

## Audit Notes

- Known access limits:
- Known parsing issues:
- Follow-up needed:
